characters.description: Eiru's returning Architect and champion. He reaches Midpoint in disguise and finds Uru's territory destabilized during his absence. A divine fragment sheltered in his mind gives him a damaging Unworthy Vessel condition and prevents him from relying on revival.
characters.name: Ruwen Starfield

characters.description: The local leader who kept Midpoint and the surrounding lands functioning under severe strain while Ruwen was absent.
characters.name: Big D

characters.description: Ruwen's mind-linked companion, who remains inside his mental world and advises him during his return to Eiru. She can read memory and emotion, and she urges him to investigate people carefully instead of letting fear or guilt dictate his response.
characters.name: Rami

characters.description: An independent construct who remains within Ruwen's mental world beside Uru's fragment.
characters.name: Overlord

characters.description: The goddess whose territory Ruwen returns to govern. In Midpoint, he finds visible resentment toward her and the regional administration.
characters.name: Uru

characters.description: A separate divine fragment sheltered within Ruwen's mind. Her presence causes his Unworthy Vessel condition, steadily harms him, and blocks revival, yet she remains an active person alongside Ruwen and Overlord.
characters.name: Uru's divine shard

characters.description: An opposing organizer whose ambush team tries to force Ruwen to swear allegiance. He is described as a merchant-crafter bard whose specialized voice can influence emotion and weaponize sound.
characters.name: The bard

characters.description: The void-band user who directs the twelve-person team sent to ambush Ruwen on his route to Eiru.
characters.name: The ambush leader

characters.description: The literal-minded intelligence that manages the third temple. Lear tracks systemic dangers, controls temple resources, and helps Ruwen assess whether mana can substitute for the spirit he can no longer use safely.
characters.name: Lear

characters.description: Ruwen's partner, a chapel priestess and healer. Reunited with him after a long separation, she recognizes both his physical injury and the grief he carries from Savage Island, helping him remember the fallen as people rather than only as losses.
characters.name: Hamma

characters.description: A sentient researcher whose lair serves as Ruwen's base while he prepares a controlled mana experiment. Fractal's home and work provide a secure setting for testing abilities that Ruwen can no longer power safely with spirit.
characters.name: Fractal

characters.description: Ruwen's hostile Black Steed of the Apocalypse. Bound to famine rather than to Ruwen, Vex understands commands but deliberately harms its summoner before being dismissed.
characters.name: Vex

characters.description: A librarian who once mentored Ruwen and reconnects with him in Eiru's crystal forest.
characters.name: Ruwen's former librarian mentor

characters.description: Rami's partner, a celestial remnant able to maintain a stable adult form.
characters.name: Rami's adult celestial-remnant partner

characters.description: The opposing merchant leader whom Rami identifies as the historical masked bard, a performer able to influence an audience's emotions through sound.
characters.name: The merchant king

characters.description: Ruwen's martial companion and Lylan's protector. During the merchant king's ambush, he stays alert to threats against the group and moves immediately to shield Lylan when the attackers target her.
characters.name: Sift

characters.description: A scout and longtime companion who directs reconnaissance during the merchant king's ambush. She marks threats for the group while Sift guards her against the enemy's focused attacks.
characters.name: Lylan

characters.description: A Deepwell worker whose wife has infiltrated the merchant king's northern organization. The discovery identifies Bliz's household as part of the quiet effort to learn what the merchant king is planning.
characters.name: Bliz

characters.description: A historical figure tied to Lylan's family line. Rami's reading of the merchant king's recovered memories establishes the connection and changes how Ruwen handles his captive opponent.
characters.name: Gundr

characters.description: A former mental construct who leads the people of Ruwen's inner world, directs their scouts, and explains how their city found order through faith in Ruwen.
characters.name: The inner-world leader

characters.description: A destructive, nihilistic construct living in Ruwen's inner world. Nameless challenges its society's faith and demands the freedom to leave for the infernal lord, forcing Ruwen to weigh a promise of free choice against the safety of everyone in his mind.
characters.name: Nameless

characters.description: A Deepwell worker who holds the ceremonial Baby Band title. Tora formally transfers the title to Ruwen, binding him to the worker community's demanding initiation traditions.
characters.name: Tora

characters.description: A powerful ally who helps Hamma revise her spell choices by supplying a special potion made through Fractal's work. Her intervention gives Hamma a rare opportunity to rebuild her capabilities.
characters.name: Blapy

characters.description: A returning fortune reader at Poor Judgment who now speaks Common and offers Ruwen another reading. Tarot also addresses an unexplained presence in Hamma's necklace, alarming Hamma and Lylan.
characters.name: Tarot

characters.description: The sentient entity carried in Hamma's necklace and a creation of Blapy. Hamma understands Archie clearly, while Ruwen receives only impressions from him, giving Hamma a distinct link to the unusual being.
characters.name: Archie

characters.description: Rami's powerful former adversary and newly reconciled ally. By the time Ruwen prepares to visit, Rami has explained their earlier conflict and restored a cooperative relationship with him.
characters.name: Xavier

characters.description: Ruwen's former bully, now a trusted figure in Deepwell. Slib publicly defends Ruwen and urges a hostile crowd to abandon preparations for war against fellow citizens.
characters.name: Slib

characters.description: A divine-metal oracle that demands something personally valuable in payment. In exchange for a prized runestone, it grants Ruwen three relic marks and calls him the conductor of the Eighth Harmony while warning of several approaching dangers.
characters.name: The relic fortune golem

characters.description: An imprisoned hostile being held within a soul-powered prison in the Black Pyramid. The Dark Priest created stalled darkness by consuming matter and spirit, and damage to the pyramid raises the danger of its escape.
characters.name: The Dark Priest

characters.description: Sift's ancient companion, capable of consuming energy at extraordinary density. When the Black Pyramid's unstable explosion threatens millions, the tortoise volunteers to help contain it and Sift insists on going too.
characters.name: Sift's elder star tortoise

characters.description: A hostile divine adversary whose agents destabilize the Black Pyramid explosion, creating a threat to millions.
characters.name: Lauquinriel

characters.description: An independent, self-developed person derived from Uru within Ruwen's mental world. She receives carefully limited knowledge from the goddess, teaches Ruwen an advanced form of spirit casting, and takes Uru's appearance for his public plan.
characters.name: The inner-world Uru avatar

characters.description: Five hostile infiltrators concealed among the manipulated fighters approaching Eiru. They remain standing after Uru's projected sacrifice breaks much of the crowd's control, exposing the apparent invasion as a coordinated ambush.
characters.name: The five Aspects

characters.description: One of five deities who join Lauquinriel in a direct attack after the confrontation with the Aspects. Haffa arrives as part of a peak-divine coalition facing Ruwen near the vulnerable civilian force.
characters.name: Haffa

characters.description: One of the five deities accompanying Lauquinriel in the assault on Eiru. Quentin is part of the hostile coalition that appears after the Aspects are confronted.
characters.name: Quentin

characters.description: A member of Lauquinriel's divine coalition, arriving with four other deities to attack Ruwen while thousands of civilians remain nearby.
characters.name: Isaac

characters.description: One of the deities in Lauquinriel's attacking coalition. Noctos joins the direct confrontation that follows the hidden Aspect assault.
characters.name: Noctos

characters.description: One of the deities allied with Lauquinriel in the direct attack on Eiru. Wenquian appears as part of the six-deity force confronting Ruwen.
characters.name: Wenquian
